# Conference BG — Professional Technical Support for Events

Conference BG (Konferencia.bg) is a professional technical support company based in Sofia, Bulgaria. We provide everything needed for the smooth running of conferences, congresses, working meetings, symposiums and other events.

## Services

- **Sound System** — High-technology loudspeaker systems, discussion microphones, wireless microphones and audio mixers
- **Simultaneous Translation** — Professional digital simultaneous interpretation systems by Bosch and Sennheiser, interpreter booths
- **Multimedia** — DLP multimedia projectors, projection screens, professional presentation software
- **Design & Lighting** — Stage design, custom backdrops, podiums and intelligent lighting
- **Tour Guide System** — Compact multi-channel tour guide system, battery life up to 20 hours
- **Recording & Streaming** — Audio/video recording and live broadcasting worldwide

## Contact

- Phone: +359 886 401 306

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/konferencia.bg/
- Address: ul. Rumen voyvoda 2, Sofia 1505, Bulgaria
